rules.rule: No compat shims, aliases for retired names, or migration helpers. A rename replaces every call site in the same change.

Python follows docs/stacks/python law in this repo: typed result rails, ruff and ty clean, polymorphic dispatch over function proliferation, uv-only package custody, version floor per pyproject.toml. Version movement is forward-only: a downgrade or stale pin without a recorded reason is a defect.
Doppler owns all secret custody. Credential values, tokens, or DSNs inlined in code, compose files, generated projections, or docs are defects; the repo carries references only.

Ops rails per docs/standards/ops-doctrine.md: CLI handlers are thin lowerers, one settings owner feeds adapters, and every operation emits a typed receipt with route, resource changes, diagnostics, counts, and timings. Domain logic in handlers, direct os.environ reads, and generic envelope abstractions replacing operation-specific receipts are defects.

SQL is declarative and idempotent: canonical schema files replay to no-op; numbered migrations and up/down pairs are defects. Search and ranking logic lives in database-owned routines, never application loops.

The Pulumi stack in admin/infra.py is the sole VPS topology owner — the image build and the db/ollama/n8n service rows behind StackOp, driven by the settings owner. Imperative provider calls or one-off scripts mutating the VPS outside its verbs, an inline credential, or a resolved DSN are defects.
